# Model Serving Frameworks — Generated Images

This directory contains diagrams and animations for Ch.6 Model Serving Frameworks.

## Generated Files

Run the generation scripts in `../gen_scripts/` to create:

- `ch06-throughput-comparison.png` — Bar chart comparing throughput across frameworks
- `ch06-kv-cache-usage.png` — Memory usage scaling with batch size
- `ch06-serving-architecture.png` — Production deployment architecture
- `ch06-decision-tree.png` — Framework selection decision tree
- `ch06-serving-throughput-needle.gif` — Animated throughput needle (10 → 150 req/s)
- `ch06-framework-comparison.png` — Generated by notebook (Cell 8)
- `ch06-cost-comparison.png` — Generated by supplement notebook (Cell 6)

## Regenerate All

```bash
cd gen_scripts
python gen_ch06_throughput_comparison.py
python gen_ch06_kv_cache_usage.py
python gen_ch06_serving_architecture.py
python gen_ch06_decision_tree.py
python gen_ch06_serving_throughput_needle.py
```
